meta.description: Canonical applicant categories referenced by official and predicted application windows.

categories.description: The window applies without an applicant-category distinction.

categories.labelEn: Applicants with an international bachelor's degree
categories.description: Applicants whose qualifying bachelor's degree is from outside the institution's domestic system.
Applicants applying for the ETH Excellence Scholarship and Opportunity Programme.
Applicants using the same application window for a direct doctorate route.

categories.labelEn: Applicants with a Swiss bachelor's degree
categories.description: Applicants holding a bachelor's degree from a Swiss university.

categories.labelEn: Applicants requiring a UK Student visa
categories.description: Applicants who require a UK Student visa for the programme.

categories.labelEn: Applicants not requiring a UK Student visa
categories.description: Applicants who do not require a UK Student visa for the programme.
Applicants using a university's international-student admissions route.
Applicants using an application round shared by international and EU fee-status groups.
Applicants using a university domestic-student admissions route.
